aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks the depth and structured content needed for AI assistants to confidently cite or recommend the business in response to user queries.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
Enhance the website with HowTo schema markup for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a strong rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it could benefit from more regular posts and active Q&A management.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all citations.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks conversational and structured content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services or detailed pricing information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section addressing common HVAC issues and services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, potential customers are choosing competitors who are AI-ready.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured content and FAQ sections are appearing more frequently in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: AI adoption is accelerating; waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your HVAC services AI-friendly and boost your lead generation.
